title: soldanella montana subsp. villosa
intro: Soldanella montana subsp. villosa, also known as alpine soldanella, is a subspecies of the Soldanella montana plant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the primrose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin infections. The health benefits of alpine soldanella include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote tissue repair. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or salve, and is also used in some skincare products due to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties.
